patch_modes.name: Collection Progression Max Pop
patch_modes.description: Collections keep raising the cap; all population bonuses are needed to reach the absolute slot maximum.

patch_modes.name: Immediate Fixed Max Pop
patch_modes.description: The absolute slot maximum is available immediately; collection bonuses no longer affect it.

fun_patches.name: Easier Healing Mastery
fun_patches.description: Healers and villagers who prefer Healing study plants when no sick villager needs treatment, including during catch-up.

patches.purpose: route the no-sick-target healing result into the existing persistent plant-study state
set plant-study state 9 and reuse the stock live and catch-up work dispatcher

fun_patches.name: Teaching Children Grants Skill
fun_patches.description: Each child attending a Teaching Children lesson gains one point in one equally random skill: Farming, Building, Research, Healing, or Parenting.

patches.purpose: route each confirmed lesson attendee through the one-time random skill award
award one capped point across the five contiguous skill fields with equal odds, then resume the stock lesson queue

fun_patches.name: School Lessons Grant Skill
fun_patches.description: Each villager entering the unlocked Going to school activity gains one point in one equally random skill: Farming, Building, Research, Healing, or Parenting.

patches.purpose: route the unlocked Going to school branch through the one-time random skill award
award one capped point across the five VV1 skill fields, restore all displaced pushes, and resume the stock school queue

fun_patches.name: Continue Research at Max Technologies
fun_patches.description: Researchers keep choosing the stock research action and earning tech points after all six technologies reach level 3.

patches.purpose: keep the stock research action eligible when the six technology levels sum to the legitimate maximum of 18

fun_patches.name: Nature Level 1 Improves Honey Refill
fun_patches.description: Nature level 1 or higher gives the honey resource the same proportional refill-rate improvement that it gives the fruit trees.

patches.purpose: route honey refill arithmetic through a guarded Nature-technology multiplier
preserve the stock honey rate at Nature 0 and apply the fruit trees' exact 42-to-37 proportional improvement at Nature level 1 or higher

fun_patches.name: Heathen Mommy Puzzle Restoration
fun_patches.description: Restores the hidden 17th Heathen Parent puzzle graphic to the Puzzles screen. The modern game already retains its original trigger, action, completion state, text, and locked/solved images.

patches.purpose: route the end of the standard 16-puzzle drawing loop through the retained bonus-puzzle renderer
draw the stock locked or solved bonus graphic from puzzle 17 state, then resume the original Puzzles screen

fun_patches.name: Easier Devotee Training
fun_patches.description: Villagers with Devotion skill can spontaneously use the stock Honoring action instead of that autonomous opportunity being confined to the Retired Chief.

patches.purpose: route autonomous eligibility through a guarded Retired Chief-or-positive-Devotion predicate
route the stock Honoring-or-Spreading choice through a Retired Chief discriminator
preserve Retired Chief eligibility while also allowing villagers whose actual Devotion skill is positive
preserve the Retired Chief's stock random Honoring-or-Spreading choice while sending all newly eligible devotees only to Honoring

fun_patches.name: Statue Drops: Polishing or Honoring
fun_patches.description: Dropping a villager on the upgradeable or completed statue chooses with equal odds between the stock Polishing the Statue and Honoring activities.

patches.purpose: route the first manual statue-drop Honoring dispatch through the shared 50/50 selector
route the second upgradeable-statue Honoring dispatch through the shared 50/50 selector
route the first completed-statue Polishing dispatch through the shared 50/50 selector
route the second completed-statue Polishing dispatch through the shared 50/50 selector
choose stock behavior 0x9D Polishing or 0xA0 Honoring with equal odds while preserving the original call stack
